narrative:
Precinct 0033 Van Buren North (precinct in Shelby County) has 669 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 4.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.7 percentage points.
